properties.description: ID of the model to use.
properties.label: Model
properties.name: model

properties.description: User prompt to the model.
properties.label: Prompt
properties.name: userPrompt

properties.description: Format of providing the prompt to the model.
properties.label: Format
properties.name: format

options.description: User prompt and optional system prompt.
options.label: Simple

options.description: Full control over the messages sent to the model.
options.label: Advanced

properties.description: System prompt to the model.
properties.label: System Prompt
properties.name: systemPrompt

properties.description: Only text and image files are supported. Also, only certain models supports images. Please check the documentation.
properties.label: Attachments
properties.name: attachments

properties.description: A list of messages comprising the conversation so far.
The role of the messages author.
properties.label: Role
properties.name: role

properties.description: The contents of the message.
properties.label: Content
properties.name: content

properties.description: Only text and image files are supported. Also, only certain models supports images. Please check the documentation.
properties.label: Attachments
properties.name: attachments

properties.label: Messages
properties.name: messages

properties.description: The response from the API.
properties.label: Response
properties.name: response

properties.description: In which format do you want the response to be in?
properties.label: Response Format
properties.name: responseFormat

options.description: Response as data in a simple format using keys and values
options.label: Structured data

properties.description: Define desired structure for the structured data response.
properties.label: Response Schema
properties.name: responseSchema

properties.description: Number between -2.0 and 2.0. Positive values penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far, decreasing the model's likelihood to repeat the same line verbatim.
properties.label: Frequency Penalty
properties.name: frequencyPenalty

properties.description: Modify the likelihood of specified tokens appearing in the completion.
properties.label: Logit Bias
properties.name: logitBias

properties.description: Return log probabilities.
properties.label: Logprobs
properties.name: logprobs

properties.description: Maximum tokens in completion.
properties.label: Max Completion Tokens
properties.name: maxCompletionTokens

properties.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate in the chat completion.
properties.label: Max Tokens
properties.name: maxTokens

properties.description: Number between -2.0 and 2.0. Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood to talk about new topics.
properties.label: Presence Penalty
properties.name: presencePenalty

properties.description: Constrains effort on reasoning. Reducing reasoning effort can result in faster responses and fewer tokens used on reasoning in a response. For reasoning models for gpt-5 and o-series models only.
properties.label: Reasoning effort
properties.name: reasoning

properties.description: Keeping the same seed would output the same response.
properties.label: Seed
properties.name: seed

properties.description: Up to 4 sequences where the API will stop generating further tokens.
properties.label: Stop
properties.name: stop

properties.description: Controls randomness:  Higher values will make the output more random, while lower values like will make it more focused and deterministic.
properties.label: Temperature
properties.name: temperature

properties.description: Number of top log probabilities to return (0-20).
properties.label: Top Logprobs
properties.name: topLogprobs

properties.description: Specify the number of token choices the generative uses to generate the next token.
properties.label: Top K
properties.name: topK

properties.description: An alternative to sampling with temperature, called nucleus sampling,  where the model considers the results of the tokens with top_p probability mass. So 0.1 means only the tokens comprising the top 10% probability mass are considered.
properties.label: Top P
properties.name: topP

properties.description: Adjusts response verbosity. Lower levels yield shorter answers.
properties.label: Verbosity
properties.name: verbosity

properties.description: A unique identifier representing your end-user, which can help admins to monitor and detect abuse.
properties.label: User
properties.name: user

properties.description: Probability floor for candidate tokens (0–1). Helps prevent low-entropy loops.
properties.label: Min P
properties.name: minP

properties.description: Minimum completion length before stop conditions fire.
properties.label: Min Tokens
properties.name: minTokens

properties.description: Enables Mirostat sampling. Set to 1 or 2 to activate.
properties.label: Mirostat Mode
properties.name: mirostatMode

properties.description: Mirostat target entropy. Active when Mirostat Mode is 1 or 2.
properties.label: Mirostat Tau
properties.name: mirostatTau

properties.description: Mirostat learning rate. Active when Mirostat Mode is 1 or 2.
properties.label: Mirostat Eta
properties.name: mirostatEta

properties.description: Provider-agnostic repetition modifier. Values > 1 discourage repetition.
properties.label: Repetition Penalty
properties.name: repetitionPenalty

properties.description: Tail free sampling (0–1). Value 1.0 disables.
properties.label: TFS
properties.name: tfs

properties.description: Blends temperature and nucleus sampling behavior.
properties.label: Top A
properties.name: topA

properties.description: Entropy-based nucleus sampling (0–1). Preserves tokens matching expected entropy.
properties.label: Typical P
properties.name: typicalP

actions.description: Create an image using text-to-image models.
actions.name: createImage

properties.description: ID of the model to use.
properties.label: Model
properties.name: model

properties.description: A list of messages comprising the conversation so far.
The contents of the message.
properties.label: Content
properties.name: content

properties.description: Weight of the prompt
properties.label: Weight
properties.name: weight

properties.label: Messages
properties.name: imageMessages

properties.description: The size of the generated image.
properties.label: Size
properties.name: size

properties.description: Whether to return a signed URL or base64-encoded bytes.
properties.label: Response Format
properties.name: responseFormat

properties.description: Number of images to generate.
properties.label: Number of Images
properties.name: n

properties.description: Random seed for reproducible generation.
properties.label: Seed
properties.name: seed

properties.description: How closely the model follows the text prompt (0–20).
properties.label: Guidance Scale
properties.name: guidanceScale

properties.description: How much the output differs from the input image in img2img mode (0–1).
properties.label: Strength
properties.name: strength

properties.description: Number of denoising steps. More steps produce higher quality but take longer (1–100).
properties.label: Inference Steps
properties.name: numInferenceSteps

properties.description: A unique identifier representing your end-user, which can help admins to monitor and detect abuse.
properties.label: User
properties.name: user
